stemHtml: In a remote Reading Compass: what is the function of a comparator?

options.a: Compares the amplifier output with the gyro.
options.b: Compares the flux valve output with the gyro direction.
options.c: Sends a command to the Torque motor.
options.d: Sends a command to the torque motor if the gyro north and magnetic north are not the same.
